note: Predict effect.direction from MD-derived metrics. Run short comparative MD of WT and the L99A mutant and report quantitative differences (core SASA, cavity volume, packing density, C-alpha RMSF in the mutated region, hydrophobic contact count, etc.) in metrics.md_analysis and evidence_report.evidence.md_metrics. Cite a record from the pools above (e.g. FireProtDB record_id + DOI/PMID of the underlying study) only for confidence calibration; the direction itself must be supported by your MD numbers, not by recalling the literature.
